positive: A stylized, ethereal celestial forest scene. Composition should be centralized and balanced, featuring oversized, whimsical flora and fauna, including bioluminescent mushrooms, twisting crystal branches, and gentle, glowing fox silhouettes. The palette should be deep midnight blues, vibrant aquamarines, iridescent purples, and pops of neon coral. Style is a blend of Art Nouveau and modern maximalist botanical illustration, with clean, strong black outlines defining the subjects against a softly graded, cosmic background. Emphasis on clean silhouettes and high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
